tooltips.enabledSourceEntityTypeList: Leave empty to use every intrinsically eligible entity type. The disabled list and Document Builder's internal exclusions still apply.
tooltips.allowSvg: SVG remains unavailable until the sanitizer and capability checks are implemented.
tooltips.allowWebp: WebP also requires a verified runtime capability.
tooltips.allowRemoteResources: Remote resources are locked off and cannot be enabled by configuration.

errors.validation: The request contains invalid Document Builder data.
errors.permission: You do not have permission to perform this Document Builder operation.
errors.relatedRecordMissing: A required related value is unavailable.
errors.mediaMissing: A required media item is unavailable.
errors.renderer: The document could not be rendered.
errors.fileStorage: The generated file could not be stored.
errors.batchJob: The document batch could not be completed.
errors.revisionConflict: The template changed while you were editing it. Reload it and try again.

warnings.valueUnavailable: A value could not be displayed.
warnings.mediaUnavailable: A media item could not be displayed.
warnings.collectionTruncated: A collection was shortened to its configured limit.
warnings.rendererCompatibility: Part of the layout was adjusted for PDF compatibility.
